title: agent-mmm
description: A Claude Code plugin providing an expert MMM agent and specialized skills for building, evaluating, and optimizing Marketing Mix Models with pymc-marketing.

title: neural-memory
description: A persistent knowledge graph plugin for Claude Code that maps your codebase into three layers - code, bugs, and tasks - Coding sessions with Claude Code always get deep context without burning tokens re-reading files.

title: phaser4-gamedev
description: A Claude Code plugin that makes building Phaser 4 web games fast and easy. It ships 4 specialized agents and 6 slash-command skills that encode deep Phaser 4 knowledge - so you can build any 2D web game without needing to memorize the API.

title: Tech Skills
description: 200+ production-ready AI agent skills for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot with orchestrator.
